item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 2h Will mention this on pod we are just about to record but the about of hacked racing accoun
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 2h Will mention this on pod we are just about to record but the about of hacked racing accounts sending dodgy DM with links (and presumably viruses if you click - so don't) is off the scale. Have asked Kealy to tell you directly @JohnnyDineen but you've been hacked, it seems. 7 1 8 8 mil
